description_long: This object is a modern laptop with a rectangular base and a thin, flat display attached by a hinge. The base is slightly wider than the display, giving it a trapezoidal profile from the side. The laptop appears to be closed in some views and partially open in others, with the screen and keyboard area forming a classic clamshell design. The exterior is smooth and uniform, with no visible branding, stickers, or ports. The silhouette suggests a minimalist, contemporary style, likely constructed from metal or high-quality plastic. The object is compact and portable, suitable for use on desks, tables, or laps in urban environments.
description: A sleek, minimalist laptop with a rectangular base and thin display, featuring a smooth, uniform exterior and a classic clamshell design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat, rectangular display and base, with the screen facing forward and no visible details.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the open clamshell form, with the display angled upward and the base extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back edge of the base and the top of the display, emphasizing the trapezoidal shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the open hinge and the display angled upward.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and off, with no visible content displayed.
